code:
import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)

    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_ay = agent_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_ax = agent_x / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    tile_colors = state.grid[:, :, 1]

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Pocket state
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[0], 13)
    pocket_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[1], 12)

    # Blue pyramid (tile=5, color=3)
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (tile_colors == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.clip(blue_pyr_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Yellow hex (tile=11, color=5)
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (tile_colors == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.clip(yel_hex_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_hex_y = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_hex_x = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Front tile
    dy_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_f, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_f, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = tile_ids[front_y, front_x]
    front_color_id = tile_colors[front_y, front_x]
    front_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(front_tile_id, 13)
    front_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(front_color_id, 12)
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((front_tile_id == 5) & (front_color_id == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (front_tile_id == 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_closed_door = (front_tile_id == 9).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_locked_door = (front_tile_id == 8).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_open_door = (front_tile_id == 10).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_any_door = ((front_tile_id == 8) | (front_tile_id == 9) | (front_tile_id == 10)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_blockable_door = ((front_tile_id == 8) | (front_tile_id == 9)).astype(jnp.float32)

    front_to_hex_dist = (jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) +
                         jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x))
    front_adj_hex = (front_to_hex_dist == 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_floor_adj_hex = front_is_floor * front_adj_hex

    # Agent adjacency
    agent_to_hex_dist = jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)
    agent_adj_hex = (agent_to_hex_dist <= 2.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_adj_pyr = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - blue_pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - blue_pyr_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Task phase
    phase_pickup = (blue_pyr_exists * pocket_empty)
    phase_place = holding_green_ball
    can_place_now = holding_green_ball * front_floor_adj_hex
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # Door analysis - find individual doors
    closed_door_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_door_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    open_door_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    all_blockable = closed_door_mask | locked_door_mask
    all_doors_mask = all_blockable | open_door_mask

    n_closed = jnp.sum(closed_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_locked = jnp.sum(locked_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_blockable = jnp.sum(all_blockable).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Nearest blockable door to agent
    dist_to_each_door = jnp.abs(yy_f - agent_y) + jnp.abs(xx_f - agent_x)
    # Large value where not a door
    door_dist_masked = jnp.where(all_blockable, dist_to_each_door, 9999.0)
    nearest_door_dist = jnp.min(door_dist_masked)
    nearest_door_y_idx = jnp.argmin(door_dist_masked) // W
    nearest_door_x_idx = jnp.argmin(door_dist_masked) % W
    nearest_door_y = nearest_door_y_idx.astype(jnp.float32)
    nearest_door_x = nearest_door_x_idx.astype(jnp.float32)
    rel_nearest_door_y = (nearest_door_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_nearest_door_x = (nearest_door_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    nearest_door_norm_dist = nearest_door_dist / (H_f + W_f - 2)
    nearest_door_exists = (n_blockable > 0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Nearest blockable door between agent and pyramid (when not holding)
    # Nearest blockable door between agent and hex (when holding)
    # For navigation: find door closest to midpoint of agent->target
    mid_to_pyr_y = (agent_y + blue_pyr_y) / 2.0
    mid_to_pyr_x = (agent_x + blue_pyr_x) / 2.0
    dist_to_mid_pyr = jnp.abs(yy_f - mid_to_pyr_y) + jnp.abs(xx_f - mid_to_pyr_x)
    door_dist_to_mid_pyr = jnp.where(all_blockable, dist_to_mid_pyr, 9999.0)
    path_door_to_pyr_idx = jnp.argmin(door_dist_to_mid_pyr)
    path_door_to_pyr_y = (path_door_to_pyr_idx // W).astype(jnp.float32)
    path_door_to_pyr_x = (path_door_to_pyr_idx % W).astype(jnp.float32)
    rel_path_door_pyr_y = (path_door_to_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_path_door_pyr_x = (path_door_to_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)

    mid_to_hex_y = (agent_y + yel_hex_y) / 2.0
    mid_to_hex_x = (agent_x + yel_hex_x) / 2.0
    dist_to_mid_hex = jnp.abs(yy_f - mid_to_hex_y) + jnp.abs(xx_f - mid_to_hex_x)
    door_dist_to_mid_hex = jnp.where(all_blockable, dist_to_mid_hex, 9999.0)
    path_door_to_hex_idx = jnp.argmin(door_dist_to_mid_hex)
    path_door_to_hex_y = (path_door_to_hex_idx // W).astype(jnp.float32)
    path_door_to_hex_x = (path_door_to_hex_idx % W).astype(jnp.float32)
    rel_path_door_hex_y = (path_door_to_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_path_door_hex_x = (path_door_to_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)

    # Room quadrant info
    mid_y = H_f / 2.0
    mid_x = W_f / 2.0
    in_top_left = ((agent_y < mid_y) & (agent_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    in_top_right = ((agent_y < mid_y) & (agent_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    in_bot_left = ((agent_y >= mid_y) & (agent_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    in_bot_right = ((agent_y >= mid_y) & (agent_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    pyr_in_top_left = ((blue_pyr_y < mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_top_right = ((blue_pyr_y < mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_bot_left = ((blue_pyr_y >= mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_bot_right = ((blue_pyr_y >= mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    hex_in_top_left = ((yel_hex_y < mid_y) & (yel_hex_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_top_right = ((yel_hex_y < mid_y) & (yel_hex_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_bot_left = ((yel_hex_y >= mid_y) & (yel_hex_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_bot_right = ((yel_hex_y >= mid_y) & (yel_hex_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    agent_same_room_pyr = (
        in_top_left * pyr_in_top_left + in_top_right * pyr_in_top_right +
        in_bot_left * pyr_in_bot_left + in_bot_right * pyr_in_bot_right
    )
    agent_same_room_hex = (
        in_top_left * hex_in_top_left + in_top_right * hex_in_top_right +
        in_bot_left * hex_in_bot_left + in_bot_right * hex_in_bot_right
    )

    # 4 neighbors of agent (up, right, down, left) - what's there?
    neighbor_features = []
    for d in range(4):
        ny = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + DIRECTIONS[d][0], 0, H - 1)
        nx = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + DIRECTIONS[d][1], 0, W - 1)
        nt = tile_ids[ny, nx].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
        nc = tile_colors[ny, nx].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
        neighbor_features.append(nt)
        neighbor_features.append(nc)
    neighbor_obs = jnp.stack(neighbor_features)  # 8 elements

    # 4 neighbors of hex (what's adjacent to hex)
    hex_neighbor_features = []
    for d in range(4):
        ny = jnp.clip(yel_hex_y.astype(jnp.int32) + DIRECTIONS[d][0], 0, H - 1)
        nx = jnp.clip(yel_hex_x.astype(jnp.int32) + DIRECTIONS[d][1], 0, W - 1)
        nt = tile_ids[ny, nx].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
        nc = tile_colors[ny, nx].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
        hex_neighbor_features.append(nt)
        hex_neighbor_features.append(nc)
    hex_neighbor_obs = jnp.stack(hex_neighbor_features)  # 8 elements

    # Full grid (169 + 169 = 338)
    full_tiles = tile_ids.astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 12.0
    full_colors = tile_colors.astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 11.0

    structured = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent position & direction (6)
        jnp.array([norm_ay, norm_ax]),
        dir_oh,

        # Pocket (13 + 12 + 4 = 29)
        pocket_tile_oh,
        pocket_color_oh,
        jnp.array([pocket_empty, holding_green_ball, phase_pickup, phase_place]),

        # Blue pyramid (7)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_y / (H_f - 1), blue_pyr_x / (W_f - 1),
                   rel_pyr_y, rel_pyr_x,
                   dist_pyr, blue_pyr_exists, agent_adj_pyr]),

        # Yellow hex (7)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_y / (H_f - 1), yel_hex_x / (W_f - 1),
                   rel_hex_y, rel_hex_x,
                   dist_hex, yel_hex_exists, agent_adj_hex]),

        # Front tile (13 + 12 + 7 = 32)
        front_tile_oh,
        front_color_oh,
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_is_floor, front_is_closed_door,
                   front_is_locked_door, front_is_open_door,
                   front_floor_adj_hex, front_adj_hex]),

        # Task action signals (4)
        jnp.array([can_place_now,
                   front_is_blue_pyr * pocket_empty,  # can pickup right now
                   front_is_blockable_door,            # should toggle
                   step_norm]),

        # Room membership (12)
        jnp.array([in_top_left, in_top_right, in_bot_left, in_bot_right,
                   pyr_in_top_left, pyr_in_top_right, pyr_in_bot_left, pyr_in_bot_right,
                   hex_in_top_left, hex_in_top_right, hex_in_bot_left, hex_in_bot_right]),

        # Same room (2)
        jnp.array([agent_same_room_pyr, agent_same_room_hex]),

        # Door navigation (9)
        jnp.array([rel_nearest_door_y, rel_nearest_door_x, nearest_door_norm_dist,
                   nearest_door_exists,
                   rel_path_door_pyr_y, rel_path_door_pyr_x,
                   rel_path_door_hex_y, rel_path_door_hex_x,
                   n_blockable / 4.0]),

        # Door counts (3)
        jnp.array([n_closed / 4.0, n_locked / 4.0, n_open / 4.0]),

        # Neighbors of agent (8)
        neighbor_obs,

        # Neighbors of hex (8)
        hex_neighbor_obs,
    ])
    # 6+29+7+7+32+4+12+2+9+3+8+8 = 127

    # Total: 127 + 338 = 465 (under 512)
    obs = jnp.concatenate([structured, full_tiles, full_colors])

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
